repositoryUrl.title: Repository URL
repositoryUrl.description: Full URL of the git repository. Works with GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, Forgejo, or any self-hosted git server.

accessToken.title: Personal Access Token
accessToken.description: Repository-scoped personal access token (PAT) or deploy token. Required for HTTPS connections. The token is injected into the URL and never stored in git history.

sshKeyPath.title: SSH Private Key Path
sshKeyPath.description: Absolute path to the SSH private key (deployment key). Leave empty to use the Homebridge user's default key (~/.ssh/id_rsa).

gitUserName.title: Git Author Name
gitUserName.description: Name that will appear as the commit author.

gitUserEmail.title: Git Author Email
gitUserEmail.description: Email that will appear as the commit author.

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Branch to push backups to. Created automatically if it does not exist.

filesToBackup.title: Files to Backup
filesToBackup.description: Absolute paths to files or directories to include. Directory structure is preserved in the repository to avoid filename collisions.

backupOnStart.title: Backup on Plugin Start
backupOnStart.description: Run a backup automatically each time Homebridge starts.
